returned_outline: Unit Outline: Semester 1 2026, Gardens Point, Internal 2026
full_title: IFN662 Software Engineering for Enterprise Systems
pre_requisite: IFN581 or ((IFN555 or IFQ555) and (IFN556 or IFQ556))
learning outcomes: Apply advanced software design patterns to enterprise-scale systems
Evaluate and implement DevOps practices including CI/CD pipelines
Design scalable and robust solutions using microservices and cloud platforms
Apply agile and scaled agile frameworks in enterprise software projects
Implement advanced testing strategies for large-scale enterprise applications
content: This unit provides knowledge on advanced concepts and methodologies in software engineering, tailored for the design, development, configuration, and maintenance of Enterprise Systems. Topics include complex software design patterns, scalable architecture, DevOps practices, scaled agile frameworks, and AI-driven development.
